ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment piece */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "install_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment being monitored */,
  "seq" INTEGER /* Sequence number for ordering metrics */,
  "pwm" INTEGER /* Pulse Width Modulation (PWM) value */,
  "rpm" INTEGER /* Revolutions per minute (RPM) */,
  "thrust" REAL /* Thrust produced by the equipment */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage value */,
  "current" REAL /* Current value */,
  "recorded_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the equipment */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the equipment */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the equipment during the metric recording */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity of the environment during the metric recording */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the environment during the metric recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment generating the alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated performance metric */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was acknowledged */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_maintenance_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_type_id") REFERENCES maintenance_types ("maintenance_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_types" (
  "maintenance_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance type (e.g., preventive, corrective) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_types" (
  "equipment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment type */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the equipment type */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the equipment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating condition record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment being monitored */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in Pascal */,
  "recorded_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operating conditions were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_conditions_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "troubleshooting_logs" (
  "troubleshooting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each troubleshooting log entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment with issues */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue encountered */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken to resolve the issue */,
  "logged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the troubleshooting event */,
  "logged_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue resolution */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("troubleshooting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_troubleshooting_logs_logged_by FOREIGN KEY ("logged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_troubleshooting_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the system setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
